home.name: Yosra Mohsen
home.tagline:
I Design the Dream.
I Build the Reality
home.description: I've always been obsessed with how things work under the hood. To me, a great app is a story that starts with a pixel and ends with a solid line of code. I bridge the gap between "how it looks" and "how it performs," making sure every user journey is a masterpiece.

uiux.title: UI/UX Design
uiux.description: Crafting intuitive and aesthetically pleasing user interfaces that provide seamless digital experiences.

flutter.title: Flutter Development
flutter.description: Building high-performance, cross-platform mobile applications with clean and scalable codebases.

graphic.title: Graphic Design
graphic.description: Designing visually striking brand identities and digital assets that communicate your message effectively.

0.title: Clinic Management SaaS Platform
0.description: Designed a comprehensive SaaS solution for medical complexes, featuring a medical dashboard and a responsive mobile website. Focused on streamlining clinic workflows and enhancing the patient-doctor digital experience.

1.title: Audit & Build Design System
1.description: Conducted a comprehensive product audit for InvestHub and built a scalable Design System, including fully optimized Light and Dark modes to ensure a seamless and accessible investing experience.

2.title: E-Commerce Management System (SaaS)
2.description: Designed a comprehensive Admin Dashboard for e-commerce management, focusing on inventory tracking, sales analytics, and order fulfillment. Optimized the end-to-end operational workflow to enhance merchant efficiency across web and mobile platforms.

3.title: Boost Sports Club App Redesign
3.description: Revamped the digital identity of Boost Sports Club with a modern mobile app redesign. Focused on creating an energetic UI and a simplified user flow to enhance member engagement and facility booking.

4.title: Maternal Care & Wellness Platform
4.description: Designed a dual-purpose platform for maternal wellness, combining a specialized e-commerce store with a doctor consultation system. Delivered a seamless web and mobile experience focused on supporting mothers throughout their pregnancy journey.

5.title: Environmental Solutions & Gas Waste Management
5.description: Designed a specialized industrial website for gas waste management and environmental cleaning solutions. Focused on presenting complex technical services through a clean, professional interface to drive B2B engagement.

6.title: Goal Tracking & Productivity App
6.description: Designed a productivity platform from scratch to help users manage goals and time effectively. Built an integrated system for task management, smart notifications, and note-taking to streamline daily routines.

7.title: B2B engagement
7.description: Designed a high-converting corporate website for a software services agency, showcasing technical expertise through a modern UI. Focused on intuitive navigation to highlight digital solutions and drive client inquiries (B2B).

8.title: Egyptian Football Association (EFA) Digital Redesign
8.description: Crafted a modern digital identity for the Egyptian Football Association (EFA), delivering a seamless web and mobile experience. Focused on enhancing fan engagement and streamlining news delivery for national teams and local leagues.

9.title: Fitting Room: AI-Powered Virtual Try-On App
9.description: Designed an innovative fashion-tech platform featuring a virtual fitting room experience. Focused on enabling users to 'try on' clothes through screenshots and photos, bridging the gap between digital browsing and physical fitting.

10.title: Legal Consultancy & Business Management Platform
10.description: Designed a comprehensive management platform for a legal consultancy firm, streamlining case workflows and client communications. Focused on creating a secure, professional interface to manage legal consultations and business operations efficiently.

11.title: Fashion E-commerce App Design
11.description: Designing a seamless fashion e-commerce experience that prioritizes intuitive navigation and visual clarity.

12.title: Sports Field Booking App
12.description: A streamlined mobile experience for finding and booking sports venues with ease and speed.

13.title: Legal Advice Platform Design
13.description: A professional UI/UX solution designed to simplify legal consulting and build user trust through clarity.

14.title: Healthcare Appointment Booking App
14.description: A user-centric platform designed to simplify medical scheduling and enhance patient-doctor communication.

15.title: Personal Portfolio: Interactive Design & Development
15.description: A comprehensive design system seamlessly integrated with Flutter, ensuring complete consistency across UI components, themes, and multi-language support

0.title: Mongiz: AI-Powered Motivation
0.description: A high-performance Flutter app designed to boost productivity through goal decomposition and daily motivation. Features seamless Firebase authentication, Supabase real-time notifications, and advanced state management for a robust user experience.

1.title: Comprehensive EdTech Ecosystem (LMS)
1.description: A scalable EdTech solution for students, teachers, and admins, built with Flutter and Clean Architecture. Implemented Cubit for robust state management and integrated complex APIs to deliver a high-performance educational experience.

2.title: ElectroHub: Advanced E-Commerce Flutter App
2.description: Developed a high-performance electronics marketplace using Flutter and MVVM architecture. Integrated professional GitHub version control and clean code practices to deliver a scalable, feature-rich shopping experience.

3.title: Full-Stack Flutter Portfolio: Clean Architecture & State Management
3.description: An advanced Flutter implementation of a custom design system, mirroring Figma styles in code with support for dynamic modes, localization, and parallax animations.

about.title: About Me
about.role: Product Designer & UI/UX Specialist | Flutter Developer
about.description: The Architect of Experience. With 3 years in UI/UX and 5 years in Graphic Design, I don't just "draw" apps—I engineer them. Now, as a Flutter Developer, I bring those designs to life, ensuring the soul of the creative vision survives every line of code. I bridge the gap between "what's beautiful" and "what actually works."

zimitail.title: UI/UX Designer — Zimitail
zimitail.description: At Zimitail, I led the entire design journey, turning complex user research into seamless, high-fidelity realities.

smartly.title: UI/UX Designer — Smartly Techs
smartly.description: Simplifying the Complex. I mastered the art of information architecture, making sure every user interaction felt natural and intuitive.

freelance.title: Graphic & UI Designer — Freelance
freelance.description: "Developed a high-performance electronics marketplace using Flutter and MVVM architecture. Integrated professional GitHub version control and clean code practices to deliver a scalable, feature-rich shopping experience."

flutter_exp.title: One Year Experience
flutter_exp.description: I took the leap from pixels to production, building robust Flutter apps with Clean Architecture and a designer’s eye for detail.
